title: Live staged orchestrator real-data spine v0
problem: Live staged orchestrator skips with unsuitable_live_artifact when fetched OpenAlex HTML lacks mock-spine markers. Operators who opt into live Ollama need extract→detect on actual ingested staged text instead of checksum-pinned fixtures.
evidence: ticket-367 unsuitable_live_artifact skip on real publisher HTML
per-step live staged fallthrough tickets 204/208/212/217 require mock marker phrases
operator request: start creating the real spine from live data
acceptance_criteria: RGE_ALLOW_LIVE_STAGED_ORCHESTRATOR_LIVE_LLM=1 with RGE_ALLOW_LIVE_LLM=1 and RGE_LLM_MODE=ollama accepts first fetchable rank-1 artifact without mock-spine markers.
Orchestrator runs live Ollama extract→link→build→detect on ingest-staged sources via live_staged_ingest fallthrough flags.
Mock-only pytest proves fetch acceptance and stub-Ollama spine without network.
Default CI pytest remains network-free; reconcile/report stay deterministic.
non_goals: Public export or default graph DB writes
rollback_plan: Revert orchestrator live LLM branch; restore mock-spine-only live orchestrator path.
